signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.55 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −80,578 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: CAD/EUR — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: CAD leads G8 (+0.448% avg, 3 pairs) while EUR lags (−0.478% avg, 7 pairs); CAD/EUR spread at 0.926%. BoC 2.25% vs ECB 2.00% — 25bp CAD carry advantage drives the divergence.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +47,218 (bullish spec positioning) vs ATM IV 9.5% near HV. 25d RR at −0.10: mild put skew despite the bullish price trend — market hedging rather than chasing. AUD/USD at 0.7144; late-trend caution signal.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral; GBP/USD at 1.3515 mid-range. COT LF net long +33,517; positioning aligned with carry. Watch 1.3600 as next resistance.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −18,062 vs RBNZ hike bias (40% priced for 27 May). Short-squeeze risk elevated if RBNZ delivers or signals hike. NZD/USD at 0.5872.
